title: Breakwave Bi Weekly Drybulk Report Nov 21 2023 3R233
section_path: Breakwave Bi Weekly Drybulk Report Nov 21 2023 3R233
section_path_text: Breakwave Bi Weekly Drybulk Report Nov 21 2023 3R233
summary:
Main
• Capesize Spot Index bounces back in the 20s… but is a correction inevitable? - Capesize spot rates staged a sharp rebound following an earlier drop into the mid-teens, with the Index moving firmly above 20,000. Futures indicate a gradual softening as we approach year end, in line with historical seasonal patterns.
